macros.token:
KRAKEN_DEVICE="\${KRAKEN_DEVICE:-cpu}" &&
case "\$KRAKEN_DEVICE" in cpu|cuda|cuda:[0-9]*) ;; *) echo "Invalid KRAKEN_DEVICE: '\$KRAKEN_DEVICE'. Use cpu, cuda, cuda:0, cuda:1, ..." >&2 exit 1 ;; esac &&

env | sort > job_environment.txt && @CONFIGURE_KRAKEN_DEVICE@ echo "Using KRAKEN_DEVICE=\$KRAKEN_DEVICE" >&2 &&
@START_GPU_MONITOR@
kraken --device "\$KRAKEN_DEVICE" -vvv
$output_format_flag --raise-on-error
#if $image.ext == 'pdf' --format-type pdf --batch-input 'input.${image.ext}' --suffix .${out_ext} #else --input 'input.${image.ext}' 'kraken_output.${out_ext}' #end if

@CONFIGURE_KRAKEN_DEVICE@ echo "Using KRAKEN_DEVICE=\$KRAKEN_DEVICE" >&2 &&
kraken& -vvv --device "\$KRAKEN_DEVICE"
$output_format_flag --raise-on-error
#if $input_type.source == 'segmented' --format-type '${segmentation_ext}' --input 'segmentation.${segmentation_ext}' 'kraken_output.${out_ext}' #else #if $input_type.image.ext == 'pdf' --format-type pdf --batch-input 'input.${input_type.image.ext}' --suffix .${out_ext} #else --input 'input.${input_type.image.ext}' 'kraken_output.${out_ext}' #end if #end if
ocr

param.name: image
param.label: Image or document
param.help: multipage is only supported for PDF inputs
